section:
Class List Here are the classes, structs, unions and interfaces with brief descriptions:D_bit
D_bit class provides an object to control a single i/o bit D_button
D_button is a base class for all single button input parent - pointer to D_bit object D_byte
D_byte class provides a single object to control a single i/o expander D_clear
Class D_clear provides an object for the front panel "clear" button D_io
D_io class provides a single object to controll both/all I2C busses and all i/o expanders on the front panel D_reg
Class D_reg provides a single object for a front panel register This is the single 16-bit register displayed on the top row of LEDs. (It can also be used to test the bottom 16 LEDs.) usbio
Class usbio provides keyboard input from the host computer. This is not a very sophisticatd class
